description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a simple, modern design. The cabinet features a rectangular shape with clean, straight lines and a warm, medium-brown wood grain finish. The front face is divided into two large panels, likely functioning as doors or drop-down compartments, separated by a horizontal divider. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist aesthetic. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. There are no visible handles or decorative elements, giving it a sleek and understated appearance suitable for urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, medium-brown wooden cabinet with two large front panels and a minimalist, handleless design. It stands on four short legs and features a clean, rectangular silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, flat panels separated by a horizontal divider, with no visible handles or hardware.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the flat, unadorned side panel, as well as the slight protrusion of the front panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a single, uninterrupted wood panel with a consistent grain pattern and no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the cabinet's depth and the clean, flat surface.
